## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX with candidate Saja Elshareif.](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves project management, client communication, and content editing using GrowthX's AI-powered platform](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Saja has extensive experience in content creation, client management, and AI prompt engineering](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [GrowthX offers opportunities for innovation and shaping processes in a startup environment](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Success metrics focus on meeting client deliverables, with potential for expanding into CSAT and product feedback](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1671.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Technical Managing Editor acts as hub of client-serving pod](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Responsibilities include:](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Project management using GrowthX's 6-week-old internal AI platform](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [Troubleshooting and providing feedback on AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Client communication and status updates](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
      - [Editing content for tone, style, and client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Works with content managers (separate management) and strategic director](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [Master's in linguistics with 10+ years of editing, writing, and content creation experience](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Recent roles:](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
      - [Director of Writing at physician-led startup (Resident Success)](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
          - [Managed 75+ client deadlines monthly](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
          - [Led social media team and implemented AI automation](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
      - [AI prompt engineer and reviewer at Outlier and Snorkel](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
          - [Evaluated AI models for various text/image/audio tasks](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
          - [Identified model weaknesses and provided improvement feedback](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)

### AI Experience and Insights

  - [Promoted to reviewer role, providing feedback to other prompt engineers](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [Learned importance of input quality for high-quality AI output](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Developed strategies for both challenging and optimizing AI models](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)
  - [Gained expertise in crafting prompts with specific constraints for desired outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

### Client Management Experience

  - [Primary point of contact for all clients at Resident Success](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Conducted webinars and presentations for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [Balanced client-facing communication with internal operations and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### Career Goals and Preferences

  - [Aims for leadership roles managing large-scale projects](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
  - [Enjoys innovative, evolving work environments](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Prefers empowering team members through mentorship and practical problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### GrowthX Culture and Opportunities

  - Startup environment (\< 1 year old) with room for process development
  - [Encourages innovation and problem-solving (e.g., ME-built client interface app)](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - ["Best hire mentality" cultural value emphasizes client-centric approach](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
  - [Opportunity to shape standards and contribute to potential SaaS product development](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Performance Metrics and Growth

  - [Current focus on meeting client deliverables (output-based contracts)](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)
  - [Future metrics may include CSAT and product feedback](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)
  - [Growth opportunities fluid due to company's early stage](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1805.0)
  - [Bonus structure in place for short-term performance recognition](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saja to complete take-home assessment (estimated 1.5 hours)](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Assessment focuses on leveraging prompts to match client applications](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Panel interview to follow as final step in the hiring process](https://fathom.video/share/oNhNeK6TPr8wsp5rhum3JiNs2LnfE4HM?tab=summary&timestamp=1936.0)
